/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libmy_robot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libmy_robot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/my_robot_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/my_robot_msgs/msg/can_frame__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/duybuntu/carrierbot_ws/build/my_robot_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libmy_robot_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
